data.name: Settings.Language.Description
data.value: Controls the language as well as date, time, and number formats.

data.name: Settings.StartWithWindows.Description
data.value: Starts the app automatically after signing in to Windows. This option is enabled by default.

data.name: Settings.StartInBackground
data.value: Open in the background at Windows startup

data.name: Settings.StartInBackground.Description
data.value: Only shows the notification area icon. Automations and triggers remain active.

data.name: Ui.Dashboard.StopAllInstancesOfThisJob
data.value: Stop all instances of this job

data.name: Ui.Automation.Details.TimeWindowsSpanningMidnightAreSupported
data.value: Time windows spanning midnight are supported

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ProcessResultHint
data.value: The result (successful = process is running) can be evaluated in if conditions.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.StartProcessArgumentsHint
data.value: Arguments are passed directly to the program. Quote values containing spaces; shell operators such as && or > are not evaluated.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ActiveWindowResultHint
data.value: The result (window active) can be evaluated in if conditions.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ElseDescription
data.value: No configuration required. This block runs when no previous condition matched.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.EndIfDescription
data.value: No configuration required. Ends the previous If/ElseIf/Else block.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.EndJobDescription
data.value: Ends the job immediately; subsequent steps and further repetitions are not executed.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.SkipEndSteps
data.value: Skip steps in the “On job end” area

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.SkipEndStepsHint
data.value: Only skips the steps configured there. Internal cleanup always runs.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ThesePointsAreCheckedAgainstTheCondition
data.value: These points are checked against the condition

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.UseAllPointsFoundByThisStep
data.value: Use all points found by this step

data.name: Ui.Macro.Steps.ToggleRecordMousePathOrClicksOnly
data.value: Toggle: record mouse path or clicks only

data.name: Dialog.Unsaved.Message
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?

data.name: Validation.IntervalPositive
data.value: The interval must be greater than 0.

data.name: Validation.ActiveWindowPair
data.value: “Active from” and “Active until” must either both be set or both be empty.

data.name: Automation.Hotkey.CaptureError
data.value: The hotkey could not be captured.

data.name: Automation.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the automation “{0}”?

data.name: Automation.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected automations?

data.name: Job.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the job “{0}”?

data.name: Job.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected jobs?

data.name: Macro.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the macro “{0}”?

data.name: Macro.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected macros?

data.name: Step.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete this step?

data.name: Step.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you want to delete the {0} selected steps?

data.name: Step.Delete.IfBlock
data.value: Do you want to delete the if block? If, else-if, else, and end-if are removed; the contained steps remain.

data.name: Settings.Updates.Description
data.value: The application checks for new versions at startup and every two hours thereafter.

data.name: Settings.Updates.Current
data.value: The application is up to date.

data.name: Error.JobStepExecution.Message
Condition.Match.Any
data.value: At least one condition must be met

data.name: Step.Description.DesktopDuplication
data.value: Captures the selected monitor and provides the screenshot as an image source.

data.name: Step.Description.TemplateMatching
data.value: Compares an image template with the image source of a capture step.

data.name: Step.Description.ColorDetection
data.value: Detects a specific color in an image source.

data.name: Step.Description.PredictMovement
data.value: Predicts a target position from previous detection points.

data.name: Step.Description.YoloDetection
data.value: Detects objects with a YOLO model and stores their position.

data.name: Step.Description.KlickOnPoint
data.value: Clicks the most recently detected image point.

data.name: Step.Description.KlickOnPoint3D
data.value: Moves the pointer to a target using an FOV calculation and clicks it.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowImage
data.value: Shows the current image in a preview window.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowOnDesktop
data.value: Draws detections, center points, and bounding boxes as a desktop overlay.

data.name: Step.Description.VideoCreation
data.value: Saves the current image stream as a video file.

data.name: Step.Description.JobExecution
data.value: Starts another job and optionally waits for it to finish.

data.name: Step.Description.ScriptExecution
data.value: Runs an external PowerShell, Python, or batch script.

data.name: Step.Description.Timeout
data.value: Waits for a configured duration before running the next step.

data.name: Step.Description.StartProcess
data.value: Starts a program or terminates running processes by name and optional window title.

data.name: Step.Description.FocusProcess
data.value: Brings a process window to the foreground or minimizes it. Optionally filters by window title.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowText
data.value: Shows configurable text on the desktop.

data.name: Step.Description.ContinueJob
data.value: Stops the current iteration and restarts at the first main step.

data.name: Step.Description.BlockInput
data.value: Temporarily blocks physical mouse and keyboard input.

data.name: Step.Description.UnblockInput
data.value: Re-enables blocked mouse and keyboard input.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.UnblockInputDescription
data.value: Immediately releases a previously enabled input block.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ContinueJobDescription
data.value: Like “continue” in a loop: subsequent steps are skipped and the job restarts at its first main step.

data.name: Step.Description.ActiveProcess
data.value: Only checks whether a matching program instance is running; no visible window is required.

data.name: Step.Description.ActiveWindow
data.value: Checks whether a specific process window is in the foreground. The window title can be filtered optionally.

data.name: Step.Description.PointComparison
data.value: Compares points with a reference point or axis expressions.

data.name: Step.Description.KeyPointMatching
data.value: Compares SIFT keypoints from a template with an image source.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Hotkey
data.value: Starts the automation when the configured keyboard shortcut is pressed.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.OnceAt
data.value: Runs the automation once at the selected date and time.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Schedule
data.value: Runs the automation on the selected weekdays at the configured time.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Interval
data.value: Repeats the automation regularly using the configured time interval.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.ProcessStarted
data.value: Starts the automation when the specified process is opened.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.ProcessExited
data.value: Starts the automation when the specified process exits.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.WindowEvent
data.value: Starts the automation when a matching window is opened, closed, focused, or renamed.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.FileSystemEvent
data.value: Starts the automation when a matching file or folder changes in the monitored directory.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.SystemEvent
data.value: Starts the automation when Windows is locked, unlocked, signed out, shut down, suspended, or resumed.

data.name: Ui.Automation.Details.WaitUntilFileReady
data.value: Wait until the file has finished writing

data.name: Validation.WindowFilterRequired
data.value: A window event requires at least a process name or part of a window title.

data.name: Validation.FolderRequired
data.value: A file or folder event requires a folder.

data.name: Validation.FolderNotFound
data.value: The selected folder could not be found.

data.name: Validation.FileFilterRequired
data.value: A file or folder event requires a file filter.

data.name: Logs.ChooseDescription
data.value: Choose the area you want to inspect.

data.name: Logs.JobDescription
data.value: Job runs, steps, launch source, and total duration.

data.name: Logs.AutomationDescription
data.value: Triggers, skipped starts, actions, and errors for each automation.

data.name: Logs.ApplicationDescription
data.value: General messages, warnings, and errors from the application.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.DetectionStep
data.value: Detection result whose detected positions are used as measurements for movement prediction.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.Model
data.value: Automatic selects the most suitable model. Linear fits steady motion, Acceleration fits changing speed, and Kalman handles noisy measurements.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.TimeBasis
data.value: Capture predicts relative to the capture time. Execution also accounts for capture age and targets the actual execution time.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.MinSamples
data.value: Minimum number of valid position measurements required before returning a prediction. Higher values are more stable but react more slowly.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.PredictionMs
data.value: How many milliseconds into the future to predict. Longer horizons generally increase uncertainty.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.ResetDistance
data.value: Maximum pixel distance for assigning a new detection to an existing track. A new track is created beyond this distance. 0 disables the limit.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.MaxSampleAge
data.value: Measurements older than this value are discarded. Lower values react faster to direction changes. 0 retains values up to the internal sample limit.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.MaxDistance
data.value: Maximum pixel distance between the latest measurement and predicted position. More distant predictions are rejected. 0 disables the limit.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.MaxFitError
data.value: Maximum mean model deviation from measurements in pixels. Predictions with a larger error are rejected. 0 disables the limit.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.Help.Prediction.MinimumConfidence
data.value: Minimum result quality from 0 to 1. It combines detection confidence, model stability, and measurement count.

data.name: Ui.Step.DynamicRoi.Description
data.value: Creates an ROI from the best match for the next job iteration.

data.name: Ui.Step.DynamicRoi.FullSearchInterval
data.value: Full-screen search after X ROI iterations (0 = never)

data.name: Ui.Step.DynamicRoi.ResetAfterMisses
data.value: Remove dynamic ROI after X unsuccessful attempts (0 = never)

data.name: Ui.Step.Roi.Hint.Static
data.value: The search is limited to the static ROI.

data.name: Ui.Step.Roi.Hint.Dynamic
data.value: The dynamic ROI automatically narrows the entire image.

data.name: Ui.Step.Roi.Hint.Combined
data.value: The dynamic ROI further narrows the static ROI.

data.name: Ui.Step.Roi.Hint.NoDynamicFull
data.value: No dynamic ROI selected. The entire image is searched.

data.name: Ui.Step.Roi.Hint.NoDynamicStatic
data.value: No dynamic ROI selected. The static ROI is used.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ConditionEditorHint
data.value: Choose whether all conditions or at least one condition must be met.

data.name: Ui.Step.IfEditor.InvalidValue
data.value: Please enter a valid comparison value.

data.name: Ui.Job.Steps.Section.Start.Empty
data.value: Steps in this section run once before the first iteration begins.

data.name: Ui.Job.Steps.Section.Run.Empty
data.value: Steps in this section run during every iteration of the job.

data.name: Ui.Job.Steps.Section.End.Empty
data.value: Steps in this section run once when the job shuts down.

data.name: Ui.Job.EndSettings.Timeout.Description
data.value: Steps still running after this time are cancelled.

data.name: Ui.Dashboard.ForceStopAllTooltip
data.value: Immediately stop all jobs including their shutdown phase and all macros (F10)

data.name: Step.Description.GetProcess
data.value: Finds a running process by its characteristics and provides the concrete process reference to subsequent steps.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.GetProcessHint
data.value: Enter at least a process name or program path. The optional window title narrows the search further.

data.name: Ui.Windows.StateQuery.Description
data.value: The step returns status, availability, and query-specific result values. They can be compared in later If steps.

data.name: Ui.Windows.DebounceInfo
data.value: Minimum interval between two accepted triggers. Additional matching events within this period are ignored.

data.name: Ui.Windows.DelayInfo
data.value: Time to wait after an accepted trigger before starting the automation.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Webhook
data.value: Starts the automation through an authenticated HTTP POST request.

data.name: Ui.Webhook.AuthenticationHint
data.value: Send the secret as “Authorization: Bearer <secret>” or in the “X-Webhook-Secret” header. The request is accepted with HTTP 202.

data.name: Validation.WebhookConfigurationInvalid
data.value: The webhook configuration is invalid. Check the port, secret, and the public HTTPS base URL in online mode.

data.name: Webhook.CopyFailed
data.value: The webhook value could not be copied to the clipboard.

data.name: Ui.Webhook.OnlineHint
data.value: The URL must be forwarded to this listener through a reverse proxy, VPN, or tunnel. Online webhooks can only be saved with a public HTTPS URL.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.ScreenAccurate.Help
data.value: Reproduces the visible cursor path on the same monitor layout.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.MotionFaithful.Help
data.value: Reproduces movement deltas relative to the cursor position at playback start.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.RemoveStop
data.value: Remove the click used to stop recording

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.Recommendation
data.value: Recommended: 1000 µs and 0 pixels for high accuracy. Smaller intervals create larger macro files.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.Settings.Help
data.value: Choose how precisely mouse and keyboard input are recorded.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.ClicksOnly.Help
data.value: Stores click positions and keyboard input without the full mouse path.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.Interval.Help
data.value: Smaller values capture more intermediate points.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.RemoveStop.Help
data.value: Prevents the click on “Stop recording” from becoming part of the macro.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.Hotkey.Help
data.value: The hotkey is not stored as input while recording.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.Hotkey.Invalid
data.value: This hotkey cannot be used. F10 is reserved for emergency stop.

data.name: Ui.Macro.StepEditor.TimeInvalid
data.value: The time value is too large or invalid.

data.name: Ui.Macro.StepEditor.DelayBefore.Help
data.value: Time since the previous step; value and unit can be selected freely.

data.name: Ui.Macro.Recording.AutoGroups.Help
data.value: Combines consecutive mouse movements into clear groups after recording.

data.name: Ui.Job.Debug.StartTooltip
data.value: Start the saved job in single-step mode

data.name: Ui.Job.Debug.Panel.SelectStep
data.value: Click a step to display its snapshot.

data.name: Ui.Job.Debug.Panel.EmptyContext
data.value: No step outputs are available in the current context yet.

data.name: Ui.Job.Debug.Status.IterationCompleted
data.value: Iteration {0} completed. “Next step” or “Continue” starts the next iteration.

data.name: Ui.ReleaseNotes.Description
data.value: New features, improvements, and fixes in DesktopAutomation.

data.name: Ui.ReleaseNotes.SettingsDescription
data.value: View what's new in the installed versions.

data.name: Step.ResultPropertyDescription.WindowsStateQueryResult.Status
data.value: Indicates whether the Windows query succeeded or why it could not run.

data.name: Step.ResultPropertyDescription.WindowsStateQueryResult.CapturedAt
data.value: Time at which Windows captured the state.

data.name: Step.ResultPropertyDescription.WindowsStateQueryResult.ErrorCode
data.value: Technical error code; empty after a successful query.

data.name: Step.ResultPropertyDescription.WindowsStateQueryResult.ErrorMessage
data.value: Error details; empty after a successful query.

data.name: Ui.Windows.RequiresElevation
data.value: This function may require administrator privileges.

data.name: Yolo.Model.yolo11n.Description
data.value: General object detection with 80 classes such as people, vehicles, and animals. Fast and resource-efficient.

data.name: Yolo.Model.screenparser.Description
data.value: Detects 55 user-interface elements such as buttons, input fields, menus, lists, and icons. Optimized for screenshots and more resource-intensive than YOLO11 Nano.
